# Auto-generated 1.18.2 compatibility for effix.
# Missing vanilla scripted triggers referenced by copied 1.18 content.

# From common\scripted_triggers\BEL_scripted_triggers.txt
BEL_communist_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = BEL_AI_RANDOM_COMMUNIST
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = COMMUNIST
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\BEL_scripted_triggers.txt
BEL_defensive_democrat_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = BEL_AI_RANDOM_DEFENSIVE_DEMOCRAT
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = DEFENSIVE_DEMOCRAT
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\BEL_scripted_triggers.txt
BEL_expansionist_fascist_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = BEL_AI_RANDOM_EXPANSIONIST_FASCIST
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = EXPANSIONIST_FASCIST
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\BEL_scripted_triggers.txt
BEL_historical_ai = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			is_historical_focus_on = yes
			has_game_rule = {
				rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
				option = DEFAULT
			}
		}
		has_country_flag = BEL_AI_RANDOM_HISTORICAL
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = HISTORICAL
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\BEL_scripted_triggers.txt
BEL_nationalist_fascist_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = BEL_AI_RANDOM_NATIONALIST_FASCIST
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = BEL_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = NATIONALIST_FASCIST
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\00_scripted_triggers.txt
check_allow_alternate_political_events = {
	OR = {
		original_tag = PHI
		#
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\CHL_scripted_triggers.txt
CHL_hub_of_the_revolution_trigger = {
	hidden_trigger = {
		tag = CHL
		has_dlc = "Trial of Allegiance"
		CHL = { 
			has_completed_focus = CHL_hub_of_the_world_revolution 
			exists = yes
			is_subject = no
			has_government = communism
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\GER_scripted_triggers.txt
GER_is_historical_ai = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			is_historical_focus_on = yes
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Waking the Tiger" }
				has_game_rule = {
					rule = GER_ai_behavior
					option = DEFAULT
				}
			}	
		}
		has_country_flag = GER_AI_RANDOM_FASCIST
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = GER_ai_behavior
			option = FASCIST
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\00_scripted_triggers.txt
has_hide_rule = {
	has_game_rule = {
		rule = obsolete_focus_branches_visibility
		option = HIDE
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\ICE_scripted_triggers.txt
ICE_has_communist_ai = {
	ICE = {
		OR = {
			has_country_flag = ICE_AI_RANDOM_COMMUNIST_PLAN
			has_game_rule = {
				rule = ICE_AI_BEHAVIOR
				option = ICE_COMMUNIST_PLAN
			}
			has_government = communism
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\ICE_scripted_triggers.txt
ICE_has_fascist_ai = {
	ICE = {
		OR = {
			has_country_flag = ICE_AI_RANDOM_FASCIST_PLAN
			has_game_rule = {
				rule = ICE_AI_BEHAVIOR
				option = ICE_FASCIST_PLAN
			}
			has_government = fascism
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\ITA_scripted_triggers.txt
ITA_is_christian_democracy_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = ITA_AI_RANDOM_CHRISTIAN_DEMOCRACY
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = ITA_ai_behavior
			option = ITA_CHRISTIAN_DEMOCRACY
		}
	}
}

	OR = {
		has_country_flag = ITA_AI_RANDOM_COMMUNIST_PLAN
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = ITA_ai_behavior
			option = ITA_COMMUNIST_PLAN
		}
	}

# From common\scripted_triggers\ITA_scripted_triggers.txt
ITA_is_socialist_ai = {
	OR = {
		has_country_flag = ITA_AI_RANDOM_DEMOCRATIC_PLAN
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = ITA_ai_behavior
			option = ITA_DEMOCRATIC_PLAN
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\BALTIC_scripted_triggers.txt
is_baltic_country = {
	OR = {
		original_tag = LIT
		original_tag = LAT
		original_tag = EST
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\00_scripted_triggers.txt
is_JAP_or_ally_of_JAP = {
	OR = {
		tag = JAP
		is_in_faction_with = JAP
		is_subject_of = JAP
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
is_korean_state = {
	OR = {
		state = 525
		state = 1029
		state = 1031
		state = 1030
		state = 527
		state = 1028
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_any_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = {
	OR = {
		JAP_army_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = yes
		JAP_naval_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = yes
		JAP_zaibatsu_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = yes
		JAP_government_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = yes
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_army_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = {
	OR = {
		JAP_army_faction_is_tier_3 = yes
		JAP_army_faction_is_tier_4 = yes
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_government_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = {
	OR = {
		has_idea = JAP_government_faction_tier_3
		has_idea = JAP_government_faction_tier_4
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_imperial_influence_demands_ready = {
	NOT = { has_country_flag = JAP_faction_demands_cooldown_flag }
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_is_home_islands_state = {
	custom_trigger_tooltip = {
		tooltip = JAP_is_home_islands_state_tt
		OR = {
			state = 536 # Hokkaido 
			state = 533 # Kita-Tohoku
			state = 1019 # Minami-Tohoku
			state = 534 # Koshinetsu
			state = 535 # Hokuriku
			state = 282 # Kanto
			state = 532 # Tokai
			state = 531 # Kansai
			state = 530 # Shikoku
			state = 529 # Sanyo
			state = 1020 # Sanin
			state = 528 # Hokubu Kyushu
			state = 1018 # Minami Kyushu
			state = 526 # Okinawa
			#state = 537 # Karafuto
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_naval_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = {
	OR = {
		JAP_naval_faction_is_tier_3 = yes
		JAP_naval_faction_is_tier_4 = yes
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\JAP_scripted_triggers.txt
JAP_zaibatsu_faction_is_tier_3_at_least = {
	OR = {
		has_idea = JAP_zaibatsu_faction_tier_3
		has_idea = JAP_zaibatsu_faction_tier_4
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\NOR_scripted_triggers.txt
NOR_is_fascist_ai = {
	is_ai = yes  
	OR = {
		has_game_rule = {
			rule = NOR_AI_BEHAVIOR
			option = NOR_FASCIST
		}
		has_country_flag = NOR_AI_RANDOM_FASCIST
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\NOR_scripted_triggers.txt
NOR_kings_no_allow_trigger = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_mtg = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_hide_rule = yes 
			}
			NOT = {
				has_completed_focus = NOR_the_stumbling_storting
				has_completed_focus = NOR_a_resurgent_labor_movement
			}
		}
	}
	else = {
		always = no 
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\NORDIC_scripted_triggers.txt
NORDIC_communist_alliance_viable = {
	ROOT = {
		OR = {
			has_global_flag = NORDIC_communist_alliance_formed
			has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = NORDIC_communist_alliance_leader_dmod }
			has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = NORDIC_communist_alliance_member_dmod }
			AND = {
				NORDIC_is_communist = yes 
				NORDIC_alliance_created_already = no 
				NORDIC_has_started_democratic_focus_tree = no
				NORDIC_has_started_monarchist_focus_tree = no
			}
			AND = {
				NORDIC_has_started_communist_focus_tree = yes
				NORDIC_alliance_created_already = no 
			} 
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\NORDIC_scripted_triggers.txt
NORDIC_has_started_communist_focus_tree = {
	OR = {
		has_completed_focus = NOR_a_resurgent_labor_movement
		has_completed_focus = SWE_align_more_closely_with_the_landsorganisationen
		has_completed_focus = FIN_towards_a_red_government
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\NORDIC_scripted_triggers.txt
NORDIC_is_communist = {
	OR = {
		original_tag = SWE
		original_tag = NOR
		original_tag = FIN
		original_tag = DEN
		original_tag = ICE
	}
	has_government = communism
	# Add more triggers if needed
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\POL_scripted_triggers.txt
POL_is_valid_to_boost_monarchy = {

	ROOT = {
		is_subject = no
		has_government = neutrality
	}
	OR = {
		has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchism_in_LIT
		has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchy_in_CZE
		has_completed_focus = POL_internal_romanian_support
		has_completed_focus = LIT_support_monarchism_in_POL
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchism_in_LIT
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_LIT }
		LIT = { NOT = { has_completed_focus = LIT_a_king_for_our_people } }
		FROM = {
			original_tag = LIT
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchy_in_CZE
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_CZE }			
		FROM = {
			original_tag = CZE
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_completed_focus = POL_internal_romanian_support
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_ROM }
		FROM = {
			original_tag = ROM
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_completed_focus = LIT_support_monarchism_in_POL
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_POL }
		POL = { NOT = { has_country_flag = achievement_POL_elected_monarch } } 
		FROM = {
			original_tag = POL
		}
	}
	NOT = {
		FROM = {
			has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag
		}
	}
	NOT = {
		FROM = {
			is_subject_of = ROOT
		}
	}
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\POL_scripted_triggers.txt
POL_is_valid_to_reject_monarchy = {	
	if = {	
		limit = {
			original_tag = POL
		}
		LIT = { 
			has_completed_focus = LIT_support_monarchism_in_POL
			NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_POL }
		}
		NOT = { has_country_flag = achievement_POL_elected_monarch }
		FROM = {
			original_tag = LIT
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			original_tag = LIT 
		}
		NOT = { has_completed_focus = LIT_a_king_for_our_people }
		POL = { 
			has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchism_in_LIT 
			NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_LIT }
		} 
		FROM = {
			original_tag = POL
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			original_tag = CZE
		}
		POL = {
			has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchy_in_CZE
			NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_CZE }
		}
		FROM = {
			original_tag = POL
		}
	}
	if = { 
		limit = {
			original_tag = ROM
		}
		POL = {
			has_completed_focus = POL_internal_romanian_support
			NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_ROM }
		}
		FROM = {
			original_tag = POL
		}
	}
	NOT = { has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag }
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\00_scripted_triggers.txt
should_play_south_american_music = {
	capital_scope = { is_on_continent = south_america }
}

# From common\scripted_triggers\SOV_scripted_triggers.txt
SOV_is_exiles = {
	#custom_trigger_tooltip = {
		#tooltip = SOV_is_exiles_tt
		SOV = { has_completed_focus = SOV_beaten_but_not_defeated }
	#}
}
